title: Mystic [Deprecated]
description: Conjure the elements of minecraft, and cast spells with mystic. Check out The Elemental!
body:
### Mod is deprecated and has been moved to The Elemental {Check it out!} 

### [[TeamNeon] The Elemental - Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-elemental)





📖 **About**:

- Mystic is a mod that aims to create a vanilla feel magic experience; using 8 elements the player can craft and cast spells, explore new structures and enhance they're gameplay

📖 **Elements**:
- **Entropy** - The element of chaos and destruction ( rutile found in soul sand valleys )
- **Fire** - The element of ignition and energy ( carnelian found in basalt deltas )
- **Light** - The element of healing and protection ( citrine found in dark oaks )
- **Earth** - The element of growth and utility ( peridot found in lush caves )
- **Storm** - The element of wind and lightning ( apatite found in the clouds )
- **Water** - The element of oceans and ice ( azurite found on the ocean floor )
- **Dark** - The element of shadows and teleportation ( iolite found in the deep dark )
- **Aether** - The element of magic and distortion ( morganite found in the end islands )
